column1: # Partition table for the Heizstabsteuerung (4 MB ESP32).
# Adapted from the Poolcontroller10 layout. No HomeKit on this device
# main `nvs` is small (Preferences only). LittleFS holds the embedded web UI;
# `histdata` is a *dedicated* NVS partition for the power-history ring buffer
# so it survives both firmware OTA (only app0/app1 written) AND
#   histdata      64 KB  (0x10000)  NVS ring buffer for power history
